nodes.label: AI as admin and time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as full reliance or autonomous decision-maker
nodes.grounding_span: I generally see it more as an assistant and time-saving tool rather than relying on it fully

nodes.label: AI as creative brainstorming partner
nodes.grounding_span: I may use the AI if i get stuck, say with a particular ingredient I'm not sure what to do with

nodes.label: Human oversight for important tasks
nodes.label_negative: Unchecked AI delegation for critical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will always check things afterwards for rosters or important ordering

nodes.label: AI complement to human sensory and creative skills
nodes.label_negative: AI replacement of human sensory and creative skills
nodes.grounding_span: Given the reliance on physical human skills as well as creativity, I can't see any threat from AI in the near future

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: extremely useful in saving time and helping to streamline more mundane tasks

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and personal development
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to be able to develop the creative process myself

nodes.label: Responsibility and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I need to be responsible for the task and check it personally myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as creative aid
nodes.grounding_span: The ability for the AI to make some suggestions or find other peoples uses of the ingredients that I would not have immediately though of was extremely helpful

nodes.label: Contentment with current AI use as collaborative tool
nodes.grounding_span: For the time being I am pretty happy with the approach I have, AI works well for me as a collaborative tool

nodes.label: Confidence in human irreplaceability in creative/sensory domains
nodes.grounding_span: I can't see any threat from AI in the near future

nodes.label: Pragmatic boundary-setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs human-essential tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I feel pretty comfortable with using the AI for jobs that are more administrative, although I will always check things afterwards

nodes.label: Situational flexibility — adapts AI use based on creative need
nodes.grounding_span: It can vary a lot depending on the needs I have
